title: He's a Real Hero
overview: Yotaro has self-described White Knight Syndrome. He hears Kidoin Makio's scream, and rushes to her rescue.

title: Are You Prepared?
overview: Yotaro decides that he can't let Makio live in her huge mansion all by herself.

title: I Am Here Now, My Lady
overview: Makio was to be taken overseas by her father. Yotaro intervenes, but finds Alice injured.

title: Daddy
overview: Yotaro becomes the target of a revenge after he'd defeated Kongoji in a duel.

title: From Now On, We're Family
overview: Yotaro's classmate, Sae, is abducted by Yuyan.

title: Just This Once!
overview: Yufeng joins the family, and they all go to the hot springs together. But there's always one person missing.

title: Be Mine
overview: Yuyan and Yotaro are abducted by the chair of the East Asia branch of the World Knights organization.

title: Give Me Courage
overview: Mao and the others go against Yoriko's command to stay put, and sneak to the town where Yotaro was hidden in order to help find him.

title: Charge
overview: Yotaro and the gang confront the Four Gods.

title: Be Who You Want to Be
overview: The battle between the Four Gods and Yotaro's family comes to an unexpected close.

title: Knighthood
overview: Yotaro and the gang are once again abducted by a Knights of the World branch director.

title: That's Why I am a Knight
